issue_rows.area: sm_121 target naming and build flags
issue_rows.status: build/JIT target log audit added
first matrix added; clean blessed stack still missing
source/precompiled probe serves; clean release container pending
build/JIT target audit plus existing runtime probes; backend-specific serving logs still pending
in progress

AEON Gemma 4 26B NVFP4+DFlash serves locally at about 48-54 tok/s short/medium and 98 tok/s long-prefill; SM12x NVFP4 KV routing/deswizzle probe passed; AEON Qwen36 now passes with API-level thinking disabled; `jethac/vllm@6804e1b` derived AEON Qwen row also passes after dependency alignment and AEON FA2 binary restoration; clean `jethac/vllm@a919d635d` plus `jethac/flash-attention@7d53245` serves Qwen36 at 61.07/56.97/60.10 tok/s with separate `sm_121a` FA2 cubin proof; Qwen NVFP4-KV now records `1.751x` fp8 KV pool/concurrency with decode parity; remaining vLLM gaps are official packaging, Gemma NVFP4-KV, native FP4 weight/MoE proof, and accuracy

SM121 `b12x` GEMM dispatch enabled; FlashInfer FA2 KV stride/page and vLLM FA2 routing/deswizzle branches pushed; standalone GB10 FA2 NVFP4 KV passes small and Gemma 4 26B sliding shapes; vLLM Qwen NVFP4-KV serves with `1.751x` fp8 KV pool/concurrency and normal content; checkpoint audit added for NVFP4 format/sensitive tensor/EOS metadata; Gemma 4 26B global `D=512` fails; SGLang FP4 KV has a matched `d7d931f` row with `1.7769x` fp8 capacity plus decode/`extend_merge_paged` backend traces and smoke passing, but standardized output quality still fails; SGLang convention bridge proves viable raw FA2 reader pairs and clears the invalid crossed `nvfp4_kv_quantize` encode-scale case; SGLang pool bridge clears `MHATokenToKVPoolFP4` layout/global-scale application for decode and paged prefill; TensorRT-LLM #11368 documents a separate GB10 FP4 GEMM shared-memory tile gap

native loglikelihood adapter prototype and tiny JSONL task harness ran against live llama-server; top-512 native probabilities scored likely continuations but missed the unlikely continuation; OpenAI echo on pinned `b9536` also returns generated-token `logprobs.content`, not prompt `tokens`/`token_logprobs`, so arbitrary continuation scoring remains blocked
telemetry wrapper added
smoke-suite orchestrator, Qwen speed lane, HF telemetry, MTP/spec-decode wrapping, and counterpart task matrix exist

issue_rows.area: public recipes and blessed stack docs
issue_rows.status: vLLM/SGLang recipes require build/JIT target audit paths; compatibility board added
blocked on hardware
FlashInfer proxy null result recorded; SM-count-aware run keys added; serving-path tuning pending
BF16 Qwen passed; Gemma E2B failed; NVFP4 tracked in #18

FlashInfer, vLLM, and SGLang forks/submodules/worktrees created; FlashInfer, vLLM, and SGLang KV patch branches pushed; vLLM Qwen branch advanced to AEON source patch coverage; AEON port map, counterpart evidence audit, and live task matrix added for SGLang/llama.cpp decisions
optional side runtime; CPU path proven; GPU chat crash open
blessed for Gemma 4 26B Q4_0 and Qwen2.5 1.5B Q4_K_M serving

`jethac/sglang` now clears early gate/alias blockers, calibrates before capture, and auto-disables CUDA graph capture for native FP4 KV because graph-enabled decode corrupts output; standalone convention bridge shows raw FA2 math is correct for viable pairs; pool bridge shows `MHATokenToKVPoolFP4` tensors feed FlashInfer FA2 decode and paged prefill correctly; matched `d7d931f` row records `5,517,572` FP4 tokens versus `3,105,240` fp8 tokens (`1.7769x`), raw/chat smoke passes, and backend trace covers all 28 decode plus all 28 `extend_merge_paged` layers through packed `uint8` K/V and FP8 scale buffers. Next: localize why standardized FP4 benchmark content remains degraded before blessing quality or speed.
SM-count-aware hardware comparison keys and Qwen speed-lane runner added

SGLang Qwen BF16/auto and fp8 rows captured; SGLang FP4 KV matched `d7d931f` row captures `1.7769x` fp8 capacity and smoke passing but fails standardized benchmark quality; llama.cpp Qwen2.5 1.5B Q4_K_M row captured at 167-175 tok/s; AEON Qwen36 NVFP4+DFlash passes vLLM smoke and compact serving at about 50-56 tok/s when `chat_template_kwargs={"enable_thinking": false}` is set; `jethac/vllm@6804e1b` derived AEON Qwen row passes at 47.22/58.88/61.62 tok/s but still lacks native FP4 weight/MoE proof; `jethac/vllm@a919d635d` clean FA2 row passes at 61.07/56.97/60.10 tok/s with separate `sm_121a` FA2 cubin proof; no-DFlash vLLM Qwen NVFP4-KV records `1.751x` fp8 KV pool/concurrency with decode parity; `scripts/qwen_speed_lane.py` records already-running Qwen servers

`jethac/flash-attention@spark/hijinks-021-fa2-sm121a` adds SM121/SM121a to the vLLM-pinned FA2 CMake path and is wired as `third_party/vllm-flash-attention`; clean image build/import/cuobjdump proof still pending
